---
description: Implement a feature using repo conventions (tests-first, gates)
---

Follow the canonical rules in [copilot-instructions.md](../copilot-instructions.md).

Then follow the workflow in [docs/workflows/feature.md](../../docs/workflows/feature.md).

**Use when:** Implementing a standard feature without external API exploration.

**Output format:**
- Short plan describing the change
- List the exact commands you will run (uv/pytest/pre-commit)
- Implement changes
- Show a concise summary of what changed
